probes.name: geography-world-seeded
probes.description: At least the 6 vendor tables exist AND countries has > 200 rows. If false, `world:install` has not run.

probes.name: geography-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis store used by geography.cache middleware reachable. Falls back to array cache on failure.

probes.name: geography-maxmind-present
probes.description: storage/app/geoip/GeoLite2-City.mmdb exists. Fallback to ip-api.com on failure.

probes.name: geography-maxmind-fresh
probes.description: GeoLite2 DB is < 14 days old. Fires MaxMindDatabaseStale event when stale (which triggers refresh).

probes.name: geography-ip-api-reachable
probes.description: ip-api.com fallback reachable. Non-critical when MaxMind is present + fresh.
